title: The Legends Were True
description:
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.

Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.

Suspicious.
conditions: Each player must have at least 10 HP
notes: Choosing to nab the map adds a [gold]Spoils Map[/gold] card to your deck and displays the flavor text "What's the worst that could happen?" before the event ends. Taking the exit slowly costs 8 HP ([red]unblockable, unpowered[/red] damage) and offers a random [gold]Potion[/gold] selected from either your character's pool or the shared pool.
